# AGENTS.md Generation

Generate AGENTS.md from all `.dominion/agents/*.toml` files.

## Template

```markdown
<!-- Auto-generated by Dominion from .dominion/agents/*.toml — do not edit manually. -->
<!-- Regenerate: dominion-tools agents generate -->
# Agent Team

Generated: {ISO 8601 timestamp}

## Active Roster

| Agent | Model | Purpose |
|-------|-------|---------|
{for each .dominion/agents/*.toml, read [agent] section:}
| {name} | {model} | {purpose} |

## File Ownership

| Directory | Owner |
|-----------|-------|
{for each agent with non-empty [governance.file_ownership]:}
| {path} | {agent.name} |

{if no file ownership assigned yet:}
*No file ownership assigned. Ownership is set by the Architect during planning.*

## Governance

**Hard stops — agents STOP and report:**
- Architectural decisions → human owns architecture
- Unapproved dependencies → check registry
- Wire format / stored data format changes → affects interoperability
- Plan deviations without documentation → plan is the contract

**Escalation:** Agent stops → reports what spec says vs what's needed → orchestrator evaluates → human decides.

## Spawning Reference

{for each agent:}
### {name}
- Invoke: `claude --agent {role}`
- MCP tools: {required MCPs from [tools.mcps]}
- Produces: {from [workflow.produces]}
```

Write to project root as `AGENTS.md`.
